name: band-column-shading
description: Table with band1Vert (green C6EFCE) and band2Vert (orange FBE5D6). 4 columns, vertical banding enabled (noVBand=0), no row/col conditionals.
expected_behavior: Col 0: green (C6EFCE, band1Vert). Col 1: orange (FBE5D6, band2Vert). Col 2: green. Col 3: orange. Same pattern across all rows.
